report.summary: Built a comprehensive Aerodrome Finance guide for Base chain's dominant DEX, including a veAERO Yield Estimator interactive component, full SEO optimization, and PUBLISH_QUEUE entry.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Topic selected: Aerodrome Finance (AERO) — no existing degen0x page, high search intent, Base chain's #1 DEX with 68% market share
Aerodrome holds ~$500M TVL (peaked $1.07B Dec 2025), ~$810M daily volume, ~$202M annualized revenue
ve(3,3) model: vote-escrow (Curve) + cooperative game theory (OlympusDAO) — 100% of fees go to veAERO voters
Three pool types: Stable, Volatile (x*y=k), Slipstream (concentrated / clAMM like Uniswap v3)
veAERO lock: up to 4 years linear; 100 AERO * 4yr = 100 veAERO; 100 AERO * 1yr = 25 veAERO
Competitive landscape: 68% Base DEX share vs Uniswap ~25%; same Dromos Labs team as Velodrome on Optimism
Q2 2026 roadmap: Velodrome + Aerodrome merge under single AERO token, expand to Ethereum mainnet
Key risks: smart contract, impermanent loss, 4-year lock-up, emission dilution for non-lockers

sections.title: Content Created
items: 878-line learn guide: src/app/learn/aerodrome-finance-guide/page.tsx
10 sections: What Is Aerodrome, ve(3,3) Flywheel, Pool Types, veAERO Voting, Tokenomics, Key Metrics, Competitive Landscape, Risks, Getting Started, FAQ
6-item FAQ structured for People Also Ask / featured snippets
Pool type comparison table (Stable vs Volatile vs Slipstream)
DEX competitive comparison table (Aerodrome vs Uniswap v3 vs Velodrome vs Curve)
ve(3,3) flywheel numbered diagram in info box
Key Metrics stats grid with March 2026 figures
4 risk severity boxes + 4 related article cards + 2 tool deep-links

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Title: 'Aerodrome Finance Guide 2026: Base's #1 DEX | degen0x' — 53 chars, primary keyword first
Meta description: 147 chars with key data points ($500M TVL, 68% DEX share)
Target keywords: aerodrome finance, aerodrome base chain, AERO token, veAERO, ve(3,3) tokenomics
OpenGraph: article type, publishedTime/modifiedTime, OG image via /api/og
Schemas: ArticleSchema (wordCount: 3200) + FAQSchema (6 Q&A pairs)
Breadcrumb component included (BreadcrumbList schema auto-generated)
6 internal links verified live to existing learn + tool pages
Added /learn/aerodrome-finance-guide to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts
